infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Zerodha Kite to use the camera to scan KYC documents and capture your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Zerodha Kite to access your photos to upload KYC documents and your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Zerodha Kite to save downloaded statements and reports to your photo library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Zerodha Kite to use the camera to scan KYC documents and capture your profile photo.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Zerodha Kite to access your photos to upload KYC documents and your profile photo.
Allow Zerodha Kite to access your media to upload and save statements.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Zerodha Kite to save downloaded statements and reports.
